text: Met with the project sponsor to understand the business problem and desired outcome
Confirmed that the performance gap is due to a knowledge or skill deficit (training is the right solution)
Documented the current state vs. desired state performance gap
Identified and profiled the target learner audience (role, experience level, prior knowledge)
Conducted at least one learner interview or observation session
Identified the delivery context (where and how learners will access training)
Documented all project constraints: budget, timeline, technology, headcount
Identified available SMEs and agreed on their time commitment
Confirmed existing materials, job aids, or training that can be leveraged or reused
Defined what success looks like and how it will be measured
Shared and obtained sign-off on the needs assessment summary or project scope agreement
Documented assumptions and flagged open risks
